title: scutellaria ovata subsp. ovata
intro: Scutellaria ovata subsp. ovata, also known as the American skullcap, is a perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of American skullcap include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). American skullcap can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
